meta.description: Two starter decks for the Excalibur Con 2026 set. Each is 36 cards. 5 cards are shared between both decks (77 unique cards, 72 total across both decks).

decks.name: Convention Life
decks.description: People-heavy, Summer activate combos, burst LP. Expression (Red) + Learning (Blue), splash Community.
decks.strategy: Play lots of People with Convention, Artist, and Pop Culture tags. Use Summer activate abilities for burst LP. Combo with Convention Locations for cost reduction and card draw. Win fast through People synergy.

decks.name: Duluth Spirit
decks.description: Location-heavy, development over time, Winter scoring engine. Growth (Black) + Sustainability (Green), splash Community.
decks.strategy: Develop Locations with Duluth and Nature tags for compounding Winter LP. Use People to accelerate Location development. Patience and resource management win the long game. Community cards provide shared-benefit tempo.

sharedCards.description: Cards that appear in both decks or could flex between them.
sharedCards.notes: Flash Mob Dance (card_ex55), Chance Encounter (card_ex70), and Moment of Inspiration (card_ex71) work in either archetype.

unboundCards.description: Cards not assigned to either starter deck. Available for deckbuilding customization.
unboundCards.notes: Word of Mouth, Shared Meal, Unexpected Friendship, Fresh Start, and Excalibur Con Grand Finale are strong standalone cards for custom deck construction.
